title: rosa spinosissima subvar. vallotii
intro: Rosa spinosissima subvar. vallotii, also known as the alpine sweetbriar, is a subspecies of the Rosa spinosissima plant, a type of rose that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The medicinal properties of Rosa spinosissima subvar. vallotii include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve menstrual cramps, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The herbal preparations of Rosa spinosissima subvar. vallotii include tea infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues.
